title: [merge-conflict] worktree-worker21: CMakeLists.txt
notes: Explored all CMakeLists.txt across project-LICHEN (main cache), project-LICHEN-worker6, project-LICHEN-worker21 and other worktrees (11,14,23 etc). Core files (zephyr/CMakeLists.txt, subsys/lichen/CMakeLists.txt, subsys/CMakeLists.txt, lib/CMakeLists.txt, drivers/CMakeLists.txt, lib/native/CMakeLists.txt, bridge-zephyr variants) are identical. No merge conflict markers, no syntax errors, all subsystems (including rpl, routing, l2, meshcore, oscore etc.) properly conditionally added. Legacy bridge subsys/lichen/CMakeLists.txt is consistent but documented as legacy to avoid symbol duplication. No build-breaking inconsistencies found. Unified version is current main cache version.
